name: runpod
description: Runpod agent skills — manage GPU pods and serverless endpoints via the Runpod MCP server, runpodctl, and flash, with conceptual guidance and worked golden paths.

plugins.name: runpod
plugins.description: One entrypoint to run any Runpod task agentically — a router plus lanes for the Runpod MCP server, runpodctl, flash, companion CLIs, and conceptual usage. Bundles the hosted Runpod MCP server config.
